

# News


- <a href="https://cros.ec.europa.eu/system/files/2025-03/1.NEWSLETTER%20AIML4OS.pdf" target="_blank">Our first newsletter</a>, highlighting the project launch, upcoming datalab presentation, and planned participation at NTTS 2025.
- <a href="https://cros.ec.europa.eu/system/files/2024-12/2.NEWSLETTER%20AIML4OS.pdf" target="_blank">The second newsletter</a> has info on three in-person meetings that took place, as well as more details on individual workpackages.
- <a href="https://cros.ec.europa.eu/system/files/2025-05/3.NEWSLETTER%20AIML4OS.pdf" target="_blank">Our third newsletter</a> was released after the first year of the project. It looked at plans across all of the workpackages, as well as an update following NTTS 2025.
- <a href="https://cros.ec.europa.eu/system/files/2025-07/4.NEWSLETTER%20AIML4OS.pdf" target="_blank">Newsletter number four</a> reports on an in-person meeting of WP12, more details on WP10, as well as a template for training materials.
- <a href="https://cros.ec.europa.eu/system/files/2025-11/5.NEWSLETTER%20AIML4OS.pdf" target="_blank">Our fifth newsletter</a> has details on a deliverable on citizen-in-the-loop, news on text classification, and progress on reconstruction of supply-chain networks.
- <a href="/resources/newsletters/newsletter_6.pdf" target="_blank">The sixth newsletter</a> has details on a deliverable on citizen-in-the-loop, news on text classification, and progress on reconstruction of supply-chain networks.



<br>



<div style="width:100%; max-width: 600px;" >
<iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7445479879292325888?collapsed=1" 
height="567" 
width=100% 
frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" title="Embedded post">
</iframe>
</div>



<div style="width:100%; max-width: 600px;" >
<iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:ugcPost:7393689435994996736?collapsed=1" 
height="567" 
width=100% 
frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" title="Embedded post">
</iframe>
</div>



<div style="width:100%; max-width: 600px;" >
<iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7380985427874328577?collapsed=1" 
height="567" 
width=100% 
frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" title="Embedded post">
</iframe>
</div>
